extensionSubtitle: Configure your clipper for smarter content management
usageDashboardSubtitle: See how often each type of clip is saved
featureUntestedNote: Not yet tested, may be unstable

templateVariableNote: {slug} is the slugified title. Use {HHmmss} or {HHmm} to embed capture time; lowercase {mm} continues to represent the month in date patterns.

yamlFieldArrayHint: Enter one item per line; the list will be exported as a YAML array.
yamlDomainHint: Add per-domain overrides for YAML fields. These overrides take precedence over global settings.

yamlDomainErrorFieldDuplicate: Duplicate field detected in the same rule.

yamlDomainErrorValueInvalid: Default value does not match the field type:
yamlDomainWarningUnresolved: Fix the highlighted errors before saving.
configTransferHint: Copy once and import anywhere to keep browsers in sync.
configTransferNote: These actions use the system clipboard—ensure the browser is allowed to access it.
emptyImportError: Clipboard is empty, please copy a configuration first
clipboardReadUnavailable: Unable to read the clipboard. Grant clipboard permissions and try again.
invalidTaxonomy: Classifier taxonomy must be valid JSON
aiChatConfigHint: Customize the format and content of AI chat clips
includeTimestampsHint: Show send time after each message (if available)
userNameHint: Customize the display name for user messages, default is "USER"

pureModeHint: When enabled, only capture Deep Research report content, excluding conversation messages
multipleReportsInfo: ℹ️ About multiple reports: Gemini can only display one complete report at a time. To save multiple reports, open each report separately and clip them.
readingConfigHint: Choose how the reading session export should capture content
readingExportModeDescription: When selecting “Full article”, the cleaned article body is saved with your highlights and footnotes embedded.
readingHighlightThemeDescription: Only affects highlight styling inside reader mode; exported Markdown stays unchanged.
fragmentConfigHint: Customize how text selections are clipped and formatted
fragmentUseFootnoteHint: When enabled, comments will be saved in Obsidian footnote format, compatible with Sidebar Highlights plugin
fragmentCaptureContextHint: When enabled, captures context around selected text and marks the actual selection with ==highlights==

fragmentModifierKeysDescription: Only one modifier key can be selected; Shift is the default option.
fragmentKeyboardShortcutsHint: In clipper dialog: Double-Enter to enter reader mode, {modifierShortcut} to clip directly
clipperCommentEditCompleted: Comment editing completed, you can use keyboard shortcuts to complete the following actions:
clipperShortcutSetupLink: Set up shortcuts for smoother experience

connectionFailureHintCheckVault: Confirm the vault name matches the Local REST API plugin

connectionFailureHintGeneric: Check the network or restart the Local REST API service
diagnosisDescription: Click “Diagnose Configuration” to review checks and repair suggestions.
diagnosisSummaryHint: Diagnosis checks REST API, path templates, domain mappings, multi-vault routing, and related settings, then prints a detailed report.
clipSuccessRestApi: Saved via Obsidian REST API to: {vaultName}
clipSuccessRestFallback: Local folder unavailable; saved via REST API
readerPanelStatus: Select text to highlight and annotate
readerPanelHint: Tip: release the mouse to open the annotation dialog; leave it blank to save highlight only.
readerHintNoHighlights: No highlights yet. Select some text first.
readerHintFailure: Export failed, please try again later.
readerHintSelectionFailure: Failed to highlight, please try again.
privacySettingsDescription: Control opt-in GA4 usage analytics and sanitized error reporting. Both are off by default and can be cleared here.
privacySettingsNote: Control data collection and error reporting
analyticsDebugDescription: When enabled we send events to GA4 DebugView and log request details in the console. Use only while troubleshooting.
analyticsDebugDisabledHint: Enable both “Usage analytics” and “Error reporting” before turning on debug mode.
analyticsDebugEnabled: Debug mode enabled. Remember to switch it off once you finish debugging.
analyticsConsentDescription: Optional. When enabled, Zendio sends low-cardinality usage events through the owner proxy to Google Analytics 4. Page content, full URLs, vault names, filenames, screenshots, and note text are not sent.
errorReportingConsentDescription: Optional. When enabled, sanitized extension_error events go through the owner proxy to GA4 so release stability issues can be diagnosed without page content or personal data.
errorReportingNotCollectedPersonal: Personal identity information or free-form user content
errorReportingNotCollectedUrls: Full URLs, query strings, URL lists, Vault names, filenames, or local paths
errorReportingNotCollectedContent: Page bodies, clipped text, reading notes, video note text, or exported Markdown
errorReportingNotCollectedPasswords: Passwords, API keys, tokens, cookies, screenshots, data URLs, or cache keys
errorChromeApiRuntimeError: Browser API request failed. Refresh the page or reinstall the extension.
errorChromeApiUnsupportedEnvironment: This browser environment does not support the required feature. Upgrade or switch browsers.
errorClassifierTransportFailure: The classifier is temporarily unavailable. We will keep using the default categories.
errorClassifierInvalidPayload: The classifier returned invalid data. We switched to the fallback strategy.
errorClassifierTimeout: The classifier timed out. Saving continued without blocking.
errorContentStorageOperationFailed: Saving data failed. The extension will continue with default settings.
errorContentShortcutUsageTrackingFailed: Shortcut analytics failed, but the feature remains available.
errorContentComponentInitializationFaile: Component startup failed. Refresh the page and try again.
errorContentMessagingFailed: Communication failed. Please try the action again.
errorExtractionNoSelection: No usable selection was found. Select content and try again.
errorExtractionNoMarkdown: Content parsing failed. Refresh the page or try again later.
errorExtractionUnsupportedContent: This page is not supported for clipping yet.
errorExtractionDispatchFailure: Sending the result failed. It will retry automatically; contact us if the problem continues.
errorI18nLanguageLoadFailed: Language settings could not be loaded. The default language is being used.
errorI18nLanguageSaveFailed: Language settings could not be saved right now. Try again later.
errorNotificationDispatchFailed: Notification delivery failed. The error has been logged.
errorOptionsConnectionInProgress: A connection test is already running. Wait until it finishes and try again.
errorOptionsVaultConfigInvalid: Vault configuration is missing required information. Check settings and try again.
errorOptionsConnectionRequestFailed: Connection test request failed. Check the network and try again.
errorOptionsConnectionResponseInvalid: Connection test returned invalid data. Try again later or contact us.
errorRestRequestFailed: Request failed. We will retry shortly, or check the network and try again.
errorRestUnexpectedResponse: The remote service returned invalid data. Please contact us.
errorRestVaultUnavailable: The backup vault is temporarily unavailable. Sync will keep retrying.
privacyFooterText: We are committed to protecting your privacy. You can update these settings anytime or request deletion of collected data.
privacyDataWillBeCleared: Data collection disabled. Existing analytics will be purged within 24 hours.
privacySettingsError: Failed to save settings, please try again.
confirmClearAllData: Clear all analytics data? This action cannot be undone.
allDataCleared: All analytics data has been cleared.
clearDataError: Failed to clear data, please try again.
videoPanelHint: Tip: Selecting text adds it automatically; press Enter twice to save notes, Esc to cancel.
videoConfigHint: Show prompts on supported video sites to capture timestamps and notes
videoFloatingPromptLabel: Display floating prompt on video pages
videoFloatingPromptHint: Works on YouTube and Bilibili. A shortcut bubble appears in the lower-right corner.
videoPromptLabelHint: Shown as the floating button aria-label for screen readers and hover hints.
videoPromptShortcutHint: Displayed in the floating prompt. Prefer Alt/Cmd combinations for easier recall.
videoPlatformYoutubeDescription: Supports watch / short pages, detects the floating prompt automatically, and lets you enter video note mode in one click.
videoPlatformBilibiliDescription: Supports BV/AV pages, keeps room for the danmaku area, and shows the shortcut hint.
videoCaptureEditPlaceholder: Add a note for this timestamp...
videoHintNoVideo: Waiting for video element to be ready...
videoHintReady: Click + to capture current timestamp. Notes are saved automatically.
videoHintNoCaptures: No captures yet. Start by clicking the + button.
videoHintFailure: Something went wrong. Please try again.
videoPromptDescription: Click to launch video mode and start saving timestamps and notes.

supportPromptDislikeQrCaption: Scan with Xiaohongshu to join the group
clipDialogInstructions: Use Tab to move between controls. Press Alt + Arrow keys to reposition the dialog.
commentPlaceholder: Write your thoughts, notes or comments here...
additionalVaultsHint: Add more vaults and automatically route content using rules.
multiVaultNameHint: Friendly name to identify this vault
deleteVaultConfirm: Delete this vault? Related routing rules will also be removed.
yamlConfigNote: Manage the YAML fields exported for each content type.
yamlConfigPlaceholder: Toggle, disable, or add YAML fields so each export includes the metadata you expect.
yamlConfigHint: Manage the YAML fields exported for each content type.
yamlFieldValuePathHint: Optional: map this field to data in the capture context. Leave empty to use captured or default values.
yamlFieldErrorNamePattern: Field name must start with a letter or underscore and use letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.
yamlFieldErrorValueInvalid: Default value does not match the field type.
yamlFieldSaveBlockedWarning: Please fix YAML configuration errors before saving.
yamlFieldAvailabilityNote: Disable a switch to hide a field. Newly added fields apply to the selected export types.
yamlConfigMigrated: Legacy YAML configuration has been updated to the latest format.
routingRulesHint: Automatically choose a target vault by domain, keywords, or URL patterns. Items that do not match go to the default vault.
routingRulesPriorityNote: Tip: higher priority rules match first, and target vaults must stay enabled.
ruleEmptyPlaceholder: No rules yet. Add one to route clips into this vault.
ruleDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g., Save tech articles to work vault
ruleDescriptionHint: Helps you remember what this rule is for.
ruleAddVaultPrompt: Please add an additional vault first.
onboardingSubtitle: Let's quickly set up your clipper extension
onboardingWelcomeMessage: Thank you for installing Zendio! This guide will help you quickly configure the extension so you can easily save web content and AI conversations to Obsidian.
step1Description: In Firefox, connect to Obsidian through the Obsidian Local REST API plugin.
step1Detail1: Install and enable the "Local REST API" plugin in Obsidian
step1Detail2: Enable "Non-encrypted (HTTP) Server" in the plugin settings
step1Detail3: Note the HTTPS URL (usually https://127.0.0.1:27124) and trust the Local REST API certificate when the browser prompts you
step1Detail5: Record your Obsidian vault name and copy the Local REST API key
step1Detail6: Fill in the above information in the extension and perform connection test
step1ChromeDescription: Chrome / Chromium can write to your Obsidian vault through Local Folder access first. Use Obsidian Local REST API as the fallback connection.
step1ChromeDetail1: Open Storage in Options and choose the vault row you want to connect.
step1ChromeDetail2: Click Choose Local Folder and authorize your Obsidian vault directory.
step1ChromeDetail3: Keep the folder permission active so Zendio can write notes directly.
step1ChromeDetail4: If Local Folder is unavailable, configure Obsidian Local REST API with HTTPS / HTTP endpoints and trust the local certificate when prompted.
step1ChromeDetail5: Run the connection test after choosing Local Folder or REST API details.
step1ChromeDetail6: Add additional vaults and routing rules only after the default vault works.
step2Description: If you have multiple Obsidian vaults, you can configure additional vaults and set routing rules to automatically save different types of content to corresponding vaults.
step2Detail2: Set routing rules based on domain, keywords, or URL patterns
step2Detail3: Example: Save tech articles to work vault, personal content to personal vault
step2Detail4: Content that doesn't match any rules will be saved to the default vault
step3Description: Let's quickly learn about the main features of the extension to help you use it better.
step3Section1Detail1: Click on blank areas of web pages to clip entire pages (wait for page to load completely and scroll to load all images)
step3Section1Detail2: Automatically recognize mainstream AI chat conversations and save formatted AI dialogue records
step3Section2Detail1: Right-click selected text or use auxiliary keys to select content, add comments, and save selected content with annotations to Obsidian
step3Section2Detail2: Enter reading mode to select multiple fragments on the same page, comment on them, and save together to Obsidian
step3Section2Detail3: Reading mode automatically arranges text fragments according to page layout, click fragment numbers for quick navigation
step3Section2Detail4: Reading mode can save full text to Obsidian with selected content highlighted
step3Section2Detail5: Whether fragments or reading mode selections, precise page links are saved for one-click return to web positions
step3Section2Detail6: Install sidebar highlights plugin in Obsidian for more convenient annotation viewing
step3Section2Detail7: Automatically restore unsaved reading or video drafts from up to 5 recently used pages within the last 48 hours
step3Section3Detail1: YouTube or Bilibili adapted playback pages, open video mode to record video timestamps and add notes anytime
step3Section3Detail2: Click numbers next to timestamps for one-click navigation and repeated viewing
step3Section3Detail3: Select page text and capture exciting comments with one click
step3Section3Detail4: After saving to Obsidian, one-click return to precise video timestamps anytime
step3Section3Detail5: Save video screenshots with timestamps so Obsidian exports keep the visual context.
step4Description: The extension also provides various auxiliary features to make your experience more convenient.
step4Detail1: Multiple browsers on the same device: one-click copy current configuration, paste to sync, no need for repeated setup
step4Detail2: Domain mapping: map common websites to friendly folder names
step4Detail3: Custom path configuration, adjust paths according to your needs
step4Detail4: Smart diagnostics: configuration issues? Smart diagnostics for quick troubleshooting
step5Description: The extension is constantly evolving to bring you more intelligent features.
step5Detail2: Bidirectional interaction, no longer just saving notes, but a bridge between browser and Obsidian
step5Detail3: Welcome to suggest improvements, development is not easy, thank you for your support
onboardingFooterNote: You can reconfigure these options in the settings page at any time.
onboardingCompletedMessage: You have successfully completed the extension configuration guide. Now you can start using Zendio to save your web content!
suggestionsModalDescription: Thank you for helping improve Zendio. You can reach the author through any of the following channels:
suggestionsModalQrPlaceholder: QR code will be added soon. For now, feel free to message via Reddit.
contactModalDescription:
If you appreciate this product or want to connect,
feel free to reach out on reddit.
The author is currently job hunting—thanks for spreading the word!
supportModalDescription: Development is not easy. If this plugin helps you, welcome to support through the following ways:

fragmentContextHighlightExampleContent: Context before ==this is the selected text== context after

onboardingConsentSupportHint: This project is independently developed. Enabling these two options helps improve development and deliver a better user experience.
